top_signals.title: How to Make Sure You Have Enough Money for Retirement
top_signals.summary: How much money do you really need to last for your retirement? It's a question investment professionals deal with on a daily basis. Gabriela Santos, JPMorgan Asset Management chief market strategist for Americas, says as Americans live longer, they have to "plan to get to and through retirement." She appears on the debut episode of "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Prediction market firms face growing scrutiny as Congress weighs regulation
top_signals.summary: Rep. Bryan Steil, R-Wisc., is working on a bill to ban Congress members and their staff from certain bets on prediction markets such as Kalshi and Polymarket.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
